content.text: Defi is an important concept in trading and financial markets. Understanding it helps traders make better decisions.
It plays a key role in analyzing market behavior and identifying opportunities.
Defi helps traders improve their strategy and manage risk effectively.
Without understanding Defi, it becomes difficult to trade consistently.
A simple example of Defi can be observed in real market scenarios where traders use it to make informed decisions.
